payload.description: A small 64×64 pixel mini-map in the top-right corner that shows the player's position as a bright dot relative to a zoomed-out view of the game world, with subtle grid lines and boundary markers. It updates in real-time as the player moves and includes a faint trail of recent positions to visualize the Movement Trail at a macro level. This gives players spatial awareness during exploration phases while maintaining the minimalist pixel aesthetic.

payload.description: A visual feedback system that triggers an expanding bloom effect radiating from the player position whenever score milestones are reached (multiples of 500 points). The bloom consists of concentric square rings that grow outward in 8 cardinal directions, with pixels fading from bright white to the player's accent color. This pairs with the existing Screen Shake VFX to create satisfying momentum during combo chains, while the expanding geometry complements the pixel aesthetic and helps players feel progression.

payload.description: A visual particle system that erupts on collision events, spawning 4-8 small square pixels that scatter outward in the direction of impact with a fade-out trail. Each dust particle inherits the color of the collided object and decays over 300ms, creating tactile feedback without cluttering the screen. This enhances the Combo Chain System and Screen Shake VFX by adding micro-level visual confirmation for every interaction.
